title: Contextual Logging
description: Contextual Logging documents overview material for Contextual Logging in the language domain. It is classified as a concept page, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights 구조화된 로깅Structured Logging, and 문맥에 따른 로깅Contextual Logging, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include context, logging, contextual-logging, language, and concepts, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / concepts / contextual-logging, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
